reviews.review_description: No longer working and for what? I tried to load this game up and nope
The game is no longer being serviced or the servers where taken down. I cannot connect to anything
I think It’s the best FPS game in VR, but I want a camera sensitivity setting. The default setting is too high for me.

developer_response.body: Glad you like it! Do you mean the turn speed for smooth turning or quick turning? Also, might be easier to have a conversation on https://www.discord.gg/FCE

reviews.review_description: Wow...totally blown away. I've owned every VR headset that has been released for the last 20 years and this game on the Quest 2 is totally INSANE! Highly recommended!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much, we have a lot more coming!

reviews.review_description: The game doesn't get the attention that it deserves. If it only did better to join up people that get abandoned until there are more players on the platform. Sometimes, it will have 3 against 1. Why not just split the team up to make it even. More players would equal a seriously kick butt game.

I'm playing on oculus quest 2 and the graphics are really great. 

The immersion is awesome. 

I really enjoyed the gameplay, easy to learn, hard to master kind of. 
Teamwork seams really important and I like a lot the fact that you have to work together to win. 

I look forward to the pro season. 

You definitely should give it a try, you won't regret

Hi developers your game is actually amazing I must say and is definitely a 5 star game. It’s the best fast passes vr to this date ! 

But I would like to give some ideas that may improve and attract more people to this game . I really enjoy playing it but I end up using half my battery life on waiting for a game . Ideas to fix that are 

-a ready up button so players can start without 8 players

-make the game free and add a battle pass or skins that are available for purchase 

Please don’t let this game die due to the inactivity of players it is really fun and I would hope in the future a lot more people purchase this game so we can have some sort of skill based matchmaking

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! We have some great plans in the work to ensure you're spending more time playing and less time waiting! Not to mention more features, weapons, maps, and more :D

reviews.review_title: Need more players but super fun
reviews.review_description: This game is fun but you should make it so less players are needed in game modes!!  It takes too long to wait for 8 people!  Make is so there are game modes like solos, quads, duos so i can play more!!! I want to play more but waiting takes too long.

developer_response.body: Big update coming soon that will make a huge impact on waiting experience, plus we'll be releasing on more devices soon! Hope you'll stick with us as we continue to grow and evolve!

reviews.review_title: One of the best shooter games for VR!
reviews.review_description: A lot of these reviews are outdated. If you look at the dates on all of the low reviews you will find that they are from some time ago. Since then, the AMAZING developers have fixed most of these issues and are fixing the rest as I type this. Furthermore, the devs are constantly releasing new updates making the game always fresh and fun to play. Now, to actually talk about the game, this is a very fast paced multiplayer shooter. It has great graphics and fluid movement mechanics. The maps are great, with lots of variety between different ones. (The teleporters can be a bit frustrating at first, but once you learn their placement, they become really cool.) The weapon pick-up system is a great concept, causing you to be good at every weapon and not just the smg or Grenade launcher. The rounds feel a little short though. (Time flies when you’re having fun!) The complaints about the lobby wait time are only half true. You wait for players to join for at most 5 minutes and then get into a group of players who usually want to play again, making it very easy to play repeatedly. Other reviews make it sound like a 30 minute wait, and it just isn’t. The only downside of this, is that there appears to be no skill-based matchmaking. (Which is understandable because the player-base is a little low, requiring it to just put anybody together.) I know that not everyone likes skill based matchmaking, (I personally do not.) but, it is a little bit fustrating when you repeatedly lose at first because you are playing against “Champions” during your first few matches. Overall, this is a great game and I am looking forward to more updates in the future!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the awesome review! Happy to hear you're having fun & want you to know that we have a lot in store for you! Wait time should drop drastically once we're out on PSVR & we do have skill based matchmaking, but since it's a small pool at the moment, it can only do so much! Hope you stick with us as we grow and evolve!

reviews.review_title: I love it but one issue (updated)
reviews.review_description:
The game is so fun fast paced and amazing best shooter but I spend more time waiting than I do playing I’m not refunding I’m waiting for a bigger player base



Update: there needs to be a report function there are too many hackers as is right now such as speed hackers aimbot hackers and don’t forget the damage hackers who can one shot me with a pistol and the loot hackers who spawn fully geared up and never lose their guns. It gets annoying, as it is absolutely I’m possible to kill these players and they get to the point without dying causing crushing defeats and stat drops. It’s annoying and I expect a fix because for this game right now, I’m disappointed. But I respect the developers a lot for alll the work they are doing to bring this game up out of the dirt.

developer_response.body: Thanks Jawz, playerbase will only keep growing & release on more headsets will really help! We hope you'll stick with us as the game evolves!

reviews.review_description: I tried to play but when I put the helmet it said Mach making and it doesn’t come go on to the game it just loads

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear about your issues! Would you mind sending us an email to contact@firstcontact.com and we can try to troubleshoot what's going on!

reviews.review_description:
I jumped into this game and POW! running sliding sneaking up on the enemy team. I was pumped for action Adrenalin was flowing and i could see myself in this arena for hours. 

Then the match ended and my team stood waiting for the opposing team to reach their numbers. My squad was excited we stood waiting and discussed various other games and slowly the adrenalin slipped away. It was like waiting in a elevator that never stopped. One by one my team bid me goodbye until I was stood alone. Then a new team mate appears then disappears. I’m thinking about a refund at this point. 

Did not get to experience if the missions would change got a feeling not. But this game could be so much more than it is. 

A training arena wile you wait would have helped with the boredom that sets in waiting around for players to join. 
A collection of more substantial mission might even attract more players to participate.

The game has a demo feel or maybe a free game to give us VR Warriors a taste of what this hardware can do the game looks fantastic the mechanics work good. Content is the problem no player should be stood around waiting in a virtual environment. 

The advise from the sobroki empire hold off until the game has been updated to become the shooter it clearly has the potential to be

developer_response.body: We get  your frustration & we're working to make sure you spend way more time playing and zero time standing around. A more social lobby is on the way first, with a lot more to come! Thanks for the support, we hear you loud and clear, and we're working everyday to improve and grow!

reviews.review_title: Little point in playing right now.
reviews.review_description: Bought it and spent an age waiting for a game to start. Never actually got to play. All depends on if other people are also playing at the same time, whereas they could shrink the required player number, drop AI players in to fill the numbers, or at the very least let you do something while you wait instead of standing there. Very disappointing.

developer_response.body: Hear you loud and clear, we actually have an update coming this Thursday that will address a lot of these issues!

reviews.review_title: Lobby Time:  ALL DAY, EVERY DAY!
reviews.review_description: I can't say anything about the gameplay as i bought it and spend 2 hours waiting in the loby without a game ever starting. Maximum of 5 out of 8 players joined than people left again.

developer_response.body: Understand your frustrations, check out our discord.gg/FCE, there are a lot of players that had a similar problem, but they've had much better luck after joining up! That being said, we are releasing on more headsets soon, which will definitely fix the problem you're having!

reviews.review_description:
Game is brilliant. Rounds are 5 minutes. Every second you stand in capture zone is 1 point. Graphic of game is great and simple so opponents are visible.
Max lvl is 50

Guns are: pistol, rifle, shotgun, rocket luncher and grenade luncher. 
Also you can pick up shields and mines

It is similar to unreal tournament from old days.

+ there is great community on Discord where you can join teams and play tournaments

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! Glad you're having fun & very happy you found the community!

reviews.review_description: Simple and easy to get into and have fun! Not like the other shooter games

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! We have a lot more on the way!

reviews.review_description: This game is really cool and like REALLY COOL! But not many players I only found one other player after about 10mins  and never played an actual match but I played that warm up round waiting for more players and just fought the other player also waiting. I really want to play with a full lobby, guns are cool fun maps (only viewed them in online videos) but I’m willing to wait for more updates, which hopefully builds a bigger player count, but to me it’s a fun game and feels really cool to like be in this game immersive and just straight up fun when I was playing against one other player.

developer_response.body: We're happy to hear you like it! We're working every day to improve, and we have a growing discord.gg/fce community that may help you find some more full games until we reach a wider release (which is right around the corner.) Thanks for the review, and we hope you'll stick with us!

reviews.review_description: This would be even better game, if there would be SinglePlayer with Bots. Or at least if Bots are automatically being added if not at least 6 real players added in Multiplayer. When I start the game, usually there are only 1-2 persons playing. It is a pity. There should be a possibility to add bots if there are only few real persons playing. Otherwise it would be an excellent game
This game looks and plays great. Action packed 4v4 first person shooter. Excellent game

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! We have a lot more on the way, so we hope you'll stick with us!

reviews.review_title: Takes for ever to get in a game
reviews.review_description: I don’t know how I feel about it but I wish I can play more for the money I spent takes forever to get in a game

developer_response.body: We hear you loud and clear! The team is working on multiple ways to alleviate this issue, we will be out on more headsets soon, but in the meantime we have some fixes that will be a big step in the right direction. We hope you'll stick with us as we continue to grow and evolve!
